_note: FIRST-PASS group -> profession scoping for mental-health MBS items. NOT authoritative. Eligibility must be verified against the Better Access rules and the MBS category/group/item notes before production use. 'mixed' groups hold items for several provider types; mbs_professions.py refines those per item from the descriptor.

groups.label: GP mental health treatment plan items
GP eating disorder treatment & management plan items

scope._note: A40 is the GENERAL telehealth group (all specialties). Restrict it to mental-health telehealth: psychiatry items (subgroup whitelist, structurally clean) OR GP/medical mental-health items (descriptor, interleaved in general subgroups). Items outside this scope are excluded from the MH map.

groups.label: Telehealth mental-health attendances (scoped MH subset of general telehealth Group A40)
Psychological therapy by clinical psychologist (Better Access)
Focussed psychological strategies by psychologist / eligible allied health
Eating disorder services - dietetics and psychological therapy
Telehealth (video/phone) allied mental health & eating disorder services
